Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT estado_ingreso, COUNT\(*\) FROM registros_ingreso GROUP BY estado_ingreso'\)
for row in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(row\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'

")

import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'

cur.execute\('DELETE FROM estudiantes'\)

print\('registros_ingreso eliminados:', cur.rowcount\)
cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM estudiantes'\)
print\('Estudiantes restantes:', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
conn.close\(\)
")

content = open\('C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/Views/Pages/DashboardPage.xaml', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('C:\\\\Users\\\\Karen\\\\source\\\\repos\\\\CSM\\\\CSMBiometricoWPF\\\\Views\\\\Pages\\\\DashboardPage.xaml'\)
\\$start = \\$content.IndexOf\('            <!-- ── Tab 2: Grados y Grupos'\)
\\$end   = \\$content.IndexOf\('            <!-- ── Tab 3: Gr'\)
\\$new   = \\$content.Remove\(\\$start, \\$end - \\$start\)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\\\Users\\\\Karen\\\\source\\\\repos\\\\CSM\\\\CSMBiometricoWPF\\\\Views\\\\Pages\\\\DashboardPage.xaml', \\$new, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
Write-Host 'Done. Removed chars:' \(\\$end - \\$start\)
")
